docs.title: Luis Gomes
docs.text:
Platform / Kubernetes engineer working across AKS and EKS, now moving into AI platform engineering and LLMOps — building the infrastructure and tooling that lets AI coding agents run reliably.

I use this site to share and to remember what I've learned along the way.

docs.title: What I work on
docs.text:
• Platform & Kubernetes — cluster operations on AKS/EKS, Talos, GitOps, and the plumbing that keeps workloads healthy.
  • AI platform / LLMOps — agent infrastructure, MCP servers, and reusable skills for AI coding agents.
  • Automation — Ansible roles and golden images (see the Notes section).

docs.title: Notes
docs.text: The Notes section collects practical references I reach for often — Ansible roles, Linux namespace commands, and more to come (Kubernetes, Talos, MCP, LLMOps).

docs.title: Base centos
docs.text:
It's a role create to deal with base changes, go to repo.

Warning

The hardening were not done yet.
